### VI. Types of Outputs

| TYPE | FORMAT | TARGET |
|-----------------------|----------------------------|-------------------------------|
| Creative Work | Films, Essays, Podcasts | Audience / Community |
| Research Artifacts | Diagrams, Sourcebooks | Academic CV, Archive |
| Interactive Tools | Apps, Templates, Agents | Creative + Commercial Users |
| Documentation | GitHub, Docs, Protocols | Team / Collaborators |
| Business Infrastructure| Services, Licenses, Maps | Clients, Partners, Licensing |
